title: APEX: The Secret Race Across America
original_title: APEX: The Secret Race Across America
overview: APEX: The Secret Race Across America is a documentary film that takes viewers on a fast-paced ride through the illegal, underground world of U.S. transcontinental racing. How fast can you drive cross-country?
